railwayProjectName.description: Optional. Exact Railway workspace project name when it differs from project (overrides fallback matching)

publishedCode.description: Expected public slug after publish (Railway marketplace URL segment)

image.description: HTTPS URL to template image (SVG recommended)

description.description: Short summary for templatePublish (Railway API enforces 25–75 chars)

workspaceAutomation.description: When true, root-repo scripts (publish/verify/sync display names) include this template
